elements.original_description: A simple piggy bank with coins dropping into it, centered on a pure white background. The piggy bank is bright pink with a cheerful expression.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple, bright pink piggy bank with a cheerful, happy expression. Coins are shown dropping into the slot at the top. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, no shading or gradients, on a pure white background. Conveys a sense of simple, approachable saving and investing.

elements.original_description: A tangled mess of colorful wires and gears scattered across a pure white background, conveying confusion and complexity.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a tangled, chaotic mess of colorful wires and mechanical gears scattered randomly. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, no shading or gradients, on a pure white background. The composition should visually convey overwhelming confusion, disarray, and unnecessary complexity.
